objective: Assure reliable service availability and performance through delivery-partner governance, transparency and measurable controls

keyResults.text: SLA-backed contracts in place: 100% of critical services covered by partner SLAs (availability, response, resolution, maintenance windows) by end of Q2.

Protect customer trust and business continuity by running a disciplined service assurance model that governs partners incident response performance: For Tier-1 services, achieve Sev1 MTTA ≤15 mins and service restoration (workaround) ≤4 hours, with 100% Sev1 bridge opened ≤15 min.
Root Cause Analysis discipline: 100% of Sev1/Sev2 incidents have RCA within 5 business days, with corrective actions closed ≥85% within 30 days.
SLA credits / penalties enforced: ≥90% of eligible SLA breaches result in credits/service adjustments applied within 30 days by Q2.
Reduce partner-driven cost leakage and rework by achieving a 10–15% reduction in cost-to-serve (baseline in Q1, reduction achieved by Q4).

Improve executive sponsor score to ≥4.4/5 by Q4 (≥4.0 Q2, ≥4.2 Q3).
Close customer success/account health actions at ≥85% by Q4 (≥70% Q2, ≥80% Q3).
Maintain anchor-client renewal retention ≥ 80% and deliver expansion wins influenced by Ops (service reviews/SteerCo actions) by Q4.”
